test-method.name: editContactSuccessfully
test-method.description: Verifying editing a contact in Manage Contact Page

test-method.name: verifyAddressUpdate
test-method.description: Verify update button functionality in Manage Footer Page

test-method.name: verifyLoginWithInvalidPassword
test-method.description: Verify Login with valid username and invalid password

test-method.name: verifyLoginWithInvalidUserName
test-method.description: Verify Login with invalid user name and valid password

test-method.name: addNews
test-method.description: Verify adding new NEWS in Manage News Page

test-method.name: cancelNews
test-method.description: Verifying cancel button functionality in the Manage News page

test-method.name: addCategorySuccessfully
test-method.description: Verifying adding a new catefory in Manage Category Page
